# video-generator

- purpose: Programmatic video generation tools built on FFmpeg
- language: Rust

## Sub-projects

### movie-maker (v0.1.0)
- purpose: Core library for code-driven video generation
- dependencies: ffmpeg-next (git), image, imageproc, tween, tokio, serde, serde_json, thiserror
- binaries: library + perf_main (benchmark)
- input: Image frames, animation parameters
- output: Encoded video files

### demo / hs-mvp (v0.1.0)
- purpose: Demo application using movie-maker for scene rendering
- dependencies: movie-maker (path), image, imageproc, tokio

## Build

```bash
cd movie-maker && cargo build --release
cd demo && cargo build --release
```

## System Requirements

- FFmpeg development libraries (libavcodec, libavformat, etc.)
